project.name: china-slot-game
project.description: Browser-based Chinese-themed slot machine game with Phaser gameplay and example server-authoritative slot operations for sessions, RNG, wallet balances, spin APIs, persistence, and RTP reporting.

nodes.name: Slot Gameplay
nodes.summary: Handles the player-facing slot experience in the Phaser client, including asset loading, slot UI setup, reel spinning, spin state transitions, free games, jackpot presentation, and backend spin result coordination. This domain owns how players initiate and experience spins in the browser.

businessRules: The browser entry point loads Phaser, runtime configuration, slot configuration, utility classes, UI helpers, state machine code, and the main slot game scene before gameplay can run.
Spin lifecycle behavior includes pre-spin validation, manual spins, auto spins, free spins, cascade/endless variants, win states, lose states, and spin button behavior.
The main Phaser scene coordinates reel spinning, wins, free games, jackpot behavior, and backend spin results.
crossDomainInteractions: Uses Game Configuration and Assets for symbols, reels, paylines, payouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and layout behavior.
Consumes Backend Session and Wallet Spin Services when backend spin results are available.
Displays payout outcomes produced by Payout and Win Evaluation.

nodes.name: Payout and Win Evaluation
nodes.summary: Determines and represents winning outcomes across client and server examples, including paylines, win data, win display behavior, payout calculation, jackpot behavior, and RTP reporting. This domain connects the configured paytable and reel outcomes to player-visible rewards and operational reporting.

businessRules: The 3x5 slot configuration defines symbols, reels, paylines, payouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and layout behavior that win evaluation depends on.
Client-side slot model and controller classes manage paylines, line highlighting, win calculation display, player state, and spin controls.
Server-side examples include payout calculation support and RTP tracking/reporting views.
crossDomainInteractions: Consumes Game Configuration and Assets for paytable, symbol, reel, and payline definitions.
Supplies Slot Gameplay with win and lose outcomes to present during the spin lifecycle.
Supplies Backend Session and Wallet Spin Services with calculated outcomes for spin records, balance changes, and RTP reporting.

nodes.name: Backend Session and Wallet Spin Services
nodes.summary: Covers the example server-authoritative backend path for session initialization, authenticated spin requests, wallet balance checks, history, persistence, rate limiting, and health/admin reporting. This domain represents how a browser client can move from local slot play toward server-controlled RNG and persisted financial state.

businessRules: The example backend includes RNG, session storage, balance checks, authentication middleware, spin endpoint logic, and basic rate limiting.
The browser integration example initializes sessions, sends authenticated spin requests, refreshes balances, and provides resilient fallback behavior against the backend API.
Persistent server data includes players, game sessions, spins, balance transactions, game configuration, RTP tracking, and reporting views.
crossDomainInteractions: Receives spin requests from Slot Gameplay through the browser-to-server integration adapter.
Uses Payout and Win Evaluation to calculate spin outcomes and update balance-related records.
Depends on Game Configuration and Assets for persisted game configuration and production hardening plans.

nodes.name: Game Configuration and Assets
nodes.summary: Defines the 3x5 slot content model and packaged presentation assets, including symbols, reels, paylines, payouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and layout behavior. It also includes documentation and persistence plans that describe setup, production hardening, and server-authoritative configuration concerns.

businessRules: The slot configuration defines the core game symbols, reels, paylines, payouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and layout behavior for the Phaser scene.
Bundled font assets include license terms covering redistribution, modification, and naming restrictions.
Server implementation documentation describes moving the slot game to server-authoritative RNG, persistence, security, monitoring, and deployment.
crossDomainInteractions: Provides Slot Gameplay with visual, audio, layout, reel, symbol, and payline definitions.
Provides Payout and Win Evaluation with paytable and payout definitions.
Provides Backend Session and Wallet Spin Services with persisted game configuration and production implementation guidance.

nodes.name: Client Spin Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Runs the browser-side player spin lifecycle from page boot through validation, reel spin execution, outcome presentation, and return to idle or follow-on spin states.

domainMeta.entryPoint: Browser loads index.html and the player uses the spin controls

nodes.name: Slot UI and Reel Presentation
nodes.summary: Creates and coordinates the Phaser scene, reels, symbols, controls, line buttons, lamps, and animation utilities that present the slot machine to the player.

nodes.name: Win and Payout Resolution
nodes.summary: Resolves spin outcomes into paylines, win data, win or lose states, jackpot behavior, and player-visible payout displays.

nodes.name: RTP and Player Reporting
nodes.summary: Persists and summarizes spin, player, and RTP data for operational reporting through database tables and reporting views.

nodes.name: Server Session Initialization
nodes.summary: Initializes the example backend session path so a browser client can obtain server-side session identity before making authenticated game requests.

nodes.name: Server Authoritative Spin
nodes.summary: Handles authenticated spin traffic on the example Express backend, including request authentication, rate limiting, RNG, balance checks, payout calculation, spin persistence, and response to the client.

nodes.name: Balance and History Access
nodes.summary: Exposes player balance refresh and spin history access through the example backend and browser integration client.

nodes.name: Slot Configuration Definition
nodes.summary: Defines the slot machine's 3x5 layout, symbol set, reel behavior, paylines, payout table, sprites, fonts, sounds, and scene layout rules.

nodes.name: Server Implementation Hardening
nodes.summary: Documents the process for moving the slot game toward server-authoritative RNG, persistence, security, monitoring, deployment, setup, testing, and production hardening.

nodes.name: Load Game Entry
nodes.summary: The browser entry point loads Phaser, runtime configuration, slot configuration, utility classes, UI helpers, state machine code, and the main slot game scene.

nodes.name: Initialize Slot Scene
nodes.summary: The main Phaser scene preloads assets, creates the slot UI, and initializes controllers required for player spins.

nodes.name: Validate Pre Spin
nodes.summary: The pre-spin state machine behavior coordinates validation before a manual, auto, free, cascade, or endless spin proceeds.

nodes.name: Spin Reels
nodes.summary: The spinReels function participates in the main Phaser scene flow for spin execution and outcome coordination.

nodes.name: Resolve State Outcome
nodes.summary: The spin state machine transitions into win, lose, free input win, or follow-on spin states after the spin result is available.

nodes.name: Orchestrate Utilities
nodes.summary: Shared Phaser utilities provide tweens, sequencing, events, GUI controls, sounds, buttons, state machines, and popup orchestration used by the slot game.

nodes.name: Manage Symbols and Reels
nodes.summary: SlotSymbol and Reel classes manage slot symbol and reel behavior within the slot-machine engine and presentation layer.

nodes.name: Manage Player Controls
nodes.summary: SlotControls, LineButton, LinesController, and SpinButton classes coordinate player inputs, line controls, and spin button behavior.

nodes.name: Animate Presentation
nodes.summary: Animation-oriented classes support visual behavior for lamps, timed behavior, coin particles, tweens, and scene effects during play.

nodes.name: Read Paytable
nodes.summary: The 3x5 slot configuration provides the symbols, reels, paylines, and payout definitions used to resolve wins.

nodes.name: Evaluate Paylines
nodes.summary: PayLine, LineBehavior, LinesController, and WinData classes represent line behavior and win data for payout resolution.

nodes.name: Calculate Payout
nodes.summary: Client and server graph nodes identify payout calculation behavior in SlotGame and the example backend WinCalculator.

nodes.name: Display Win State
nodes.summary: WinController and win-related state machine classes coordinate win display behavior, lose behavior, and free input win states after payout resolution.

nodes.name: Persist Spin and Player Data
nodes.summary: Database tables for players, game sessions, spins, and balance transactions store persistent slot server data.

nodes.name: Track RTP
nodes.summary: The rtp_tracking table stores persistent RTP data for slot server operations.

nodes.name: Summarize Current RTP
nodes.summary: The v_current_rtp reporting view summarizes slot server operational or RTP data.

nodes.name: Summarize Player Stats
nodes.summary: The v_player_stats reporting view summarizes player-level slot server operational or RTP data.

nodes.name: Call Session Init
nodes.summary: The browser integration client initializes a session against the slot backend API.

nodes.name: Handle Session Endpoint
nodes.summary: The POST /api/game/session/init endpoint handles session initialization traffic for the example server.

nodes.name: Store Session Data
nodes.summary: The game_sessions table stores persistent slot server session data.

nodes.name: Submit Authenticated Spin
nodes.summary: The browser-to-server integration example sends authenticated spin requests to the backend API.

nodes.name: Authenticate Request
nodes.summary: The authenticateToken middleware supports request authentication for backend spin API handling.

nodes.name: Apply Rate Limiting and Balance Checks
nodes.summary: The example Express backend includes basic rate limiting and balance checks before completing spin endpoint logic.

nodes.name: Generate RNG Outcome
nodes.summary: ServerRNG supports random number generation for server-side slot spin handling.

nodes.name: Calculate and Persist Spin
nodes.summary: The backend spin endpoint uses payout calculation support and persistent tables for spins and balance transactions.

nodes.name: Refresh Balance
nodes.summary: The browser client refreshes balances through the backend, and the GET /api/game/balance endpoint handles balance API traffic.

nodes.name: Record Balance Transactions
nodes.summary: The balance_transactions table stores persistent wallet-related slot server data.

nodes.name: Get Spin History
nodes.summary: The GET /api/game/history endpoint handles slot server history traffic.

nodes.name: Define Layout and Symbols
nodes.summary: The large 3x5 slot configuration defines symbols, reels, sprites, fonts, sounds, and slot layout behavior for the Phaser scene.

nodes.name: Define Paylines and Payouts
nodes.summary: The same configuration defines paylines and payouts consumed by win and payout evaluation.

nodes.name: Load Packaged Font Assets
nodes.summary: Font package documentation describes bundled Vollkorn font family files and usage metadata.

nodes.name: Respect Asset Licensing
nodes.summary: The bundled Vollkorn font license covers redistribution, modification, and naming restrictions for font assets.

nodes.name: Plan Server Authoritative RNG
nodes.summary: The server implementation plan describes moving the slot game to server-authoritative RNG, persistence, security, monitoring, and deployment.

nodes.name: Follow Implementation Checklist
nodes.summary: The implementation checklist organizes server setup, authentication, game logic, APIs, database integration, testing, deployment, and monitoring into phases.

nodes.name: Test API Setup
nodes.summary: The server examples README explains setup steps, API test commands, and production hardening work that remains.

nodes.name: Declare Server Runtime
nodes.summary: The example server package configuration declares runtime scripts and dependencies for Express, JWT, PostgreSQL, security, and testing.

edges.description: Configuration and assets provide the symbols, reels, layouts, sprites, fonts, sounds, and presentation rules used by browser gameplay.
Paytable, payline, symbol, reel, and payout definitions are consumed by win and payout evaluation.
The Phaser scene and browser client adapter coordinate backend spin results, session initialization, authenticated spin requests, and balance refreshes.
The server-authoritative spin path uses payout calculation and stores spin, balance, and RTP data for reporting.
